---
title: "Sir Gilbert Redvers Heathcote 8th Bt."
---

## Sir Gilbert Redvers Heathcote 8th Bt.

**Dates:** (1854-1937)

### Description

landowner

### Biography

He was grandson of Sir William Heathcote, 5th Bt..

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
